$comment: C23 _BitInt(N) as a bit-field MEMBER type (D-CSUBSET-BITINT-BITFIELD, C4a). A _BitInt(N<=64) bit-field runs at its native container (the enum-bit-field reprKind precedent): unsigned zero-extends, signed sign-extends, a >32-bit base uses the 64-bit allocation unit. Exit 42 is RED-ON-DISABLE on the signed 4-bit field's sign-extension (broken -> 26) and the 33-bit field surviving a 64-bit unit (32-bit-only -> 16). Operands volatile-seeded (no const-fold); the release arm re-checks the store/load through mem2reg/CSE/DCE.
